Reorder import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved java.io.* import before java.net.* import

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat string concatenation in constant definition to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat constant definitions to place value on the same line as the declaration.
Reformat constant definitions to place value on the same line as the declaration.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Import CRLFLogConverter to enable safe logging of multi-line strings without breaking log parsers.
Refactor multi-line string concatenation in log.info to use Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Pass CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to the logger to ensure the text block content is logged correctly without line-break issues.
Update profile logging logic to display default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set, improving startup information clarity.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Restrict AsyncConfiguration bean registration to exclude specific test profiles to prevent conflicts during testing.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style conventions.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta EE compatible Hibernate5JakartaModule to support the namespace shift in Spring Boot 3.
Remove the ProblemModule bean and its import, likely due to the removal of the zalando-problem library or a change in how problems are handled in the newer framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: remove import org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule; remove @Bean public ProblemModule problemModule()

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean and its import, consistent with the removal of the zalando-problem library dependencies.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: remove import org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule; remove @Bean public ConstraintViolationProblemModule constraintViolationProblemModule()

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new label filter API.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support the new method security architecture in Spring Security 5.7+.
Replace deprecated antMatchers in authorizeRequests with requestMatchers in authorizeHttpRequests to align with the new matcher API.
Update header configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for content security policy, frame options, and permissions policy.
Replace custom problem support entry points with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Enable OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to replace the custom JWT filter chain.
Replace the manual CorsFilter injection with a SpaWebFilter added after BasicAuthenticationFilter.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new ignoringRequestMatchers syntax within the lambda DSL.
Remove the separate WebSecurity ignore configuration as static resources are now permitted via authorizeHttpRequests.
Source Content Security Policy directives from JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding them.
Replace deprecated featurePolicy with the new permissionsPolicy directive.
Change frame options from deny to sameOrigin to allow h2-console and other internal frames.
Add explicit authorization rule for v3/api-docs requiring ADMIN authority.
Update static resource matching patterns to be more specific (e.g., /app/**, /i18n/**) rather than ignoring them globally.
Consolidate static resource locations by adding a root static directory to the classpath search path.
Update resource path patterns to explicitly match common static file extensions and adjust directory mappings.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced generic path patterns like "/app/*" with specific extensions like "/*.js", "/*.css" and updated directory patterns.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints instead of legacy Swagger 2 paths.
